visual_description: A group of people, mostly in dark clothing, are running frantically across a courtyard as a massive explosion erupts behind them, sending flames and debris into the air. The individuals are in motion, some shielding their heads or looking back toward the blast, while others continue running toward a building entrance. The scene is set at night in front of a large, gothic-style building with arched windows, partially illuminated by the fiery explosion.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice with a high pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable non-speech sounds or background noise.
